Table of Contents

Enum esriLasAttributeType

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

LAS point attribute type.

[Guid("1FF537F5-AADF-4ED3-B8ED-4A25F4D4699F")]
public enum esriLasAttributeType

Fields

esriLasClassCode = 32

32: LAS classification code.

esriLasColorBlue = 4096

4096: LAS blue color.

esriLasColorGreen = 2048

2048: LAS green color.

esriLasColorNIR = 131072

131072: LAS near infrared color.

esriLasColorRGB = 8192

8192: LAS RGB color.

esriLasColorRed = 1024

1024: LAS red color.

esriLasEdgeOfFlightLine = 16

16: LAS edge of flight line.

esriLasFileID = 262144

262144: File ID.

esriLasGpsTime = 512

512: LAS GPS time.

esriLasIntensity = 1

1: LAS intensity value.

esriLasNone = 0

0: None.

esriLasNumberOfReturns = 4

4: LAS number of returns.

esriLasPointID = 524288

524288: Point ID.

esriLasPointSourceID = 256

256: LAS point source ID (user bit field).

esriLasReturnNumber = 2

2: LAS return number.

esriLasScanAngleDegree = 65536

65536: LAS scan angle.

esriLasScanAngleRank = 64

64: LAS scan angle rank.

esriLasScanDirectionFlag = 8

8: LAS scan direction flag.

esriLasScannerChannel = 32768

32768: LAS scanner channel.

esriLasUserData = 128

128: LAS user data (file marker).

esriLasZ = 16384

16384: LAS z coordinate.
